title: Kim Jong Un Inspects Russian Aviation Facilities Secures Su-35 Fighter Jets Deal
summary: Kim Jong Un conducts high-profile inspection of Russian aviation facilities. Russia supplies advanced Sukhoi Su-35 multirole fighter jets to North Korea. Deal escalates military cooperation amid artillery exchanges for Ukraine conflict.
contents:
## Kim Jong Un Inspects Russian Aviation Facilities Secures Su-35 Fighter Jets Deal

### Overview
Kim Jong Un conducts high-profile inspection of Russian aviation facilities. Russia supplies advanced Sukhoi Su-35 multirole fighter jets to North Korea. Deal escalates military cooperation amid artillery exchanges for Ukraine conflict.

### Event Details
Kim Jong Un visits Russian aviation facilities, prompting Russia to supply North Korea with advanced **Sukhoi Su-35** multirole fighter jets. Analysts describe the transfer as strategic quid pro quo for Pyongyang's ongoing shipments of artillery shells and munitions to Russian forces in Ukraine. This development escalates military ties between Moscow and Pyongyang, threatening to dismantle remaining United Nations sanctions. Kim Jong Un observes Russian aircraft operations firsthand during the inspection, strengthening bilateral defense collaboration. Russia demonstrates willingness to bypass global restrictions, raising alarms over weakening enforcement mechanisms. Pyongyang bolsters its air capabilities through this deal, countering regional adversaries. The inspection highlights deepening alliance, with Kim Jong Un praising Russian technological prowess. Moscow reciprocates by hailing stronger ties, as evidenced in recent high-level meetings. North Korea continues artillery production and delivery to support Russia's war efforts. This exchange signals geopolitical fragmentation in Asia, shifting power dynamics. Observers note the Su-35 jets enhance North Korea's multirole strike potential significantly. Kim Jong Un's tour underscores commitment to mutual military support. Russia accelerates jet deliveries following the visit, defying international pressure. Pyongyang leverages the acquisition to modernize its aging air force rapidly.

### Source Context
@Pyongyang_Today (Pyongyang Today) covers this category of developments. The account focuses on north korea kcna kim jong un military inspection state media announcement.
